items.title: S01E01 - Moving On
items.summary: George and Mildred go house hunting and find their dream home in an up market part of town, but their potential neighbours, the Fourmiles, do not want them to move in.

infolabels.title: Moving On
infolabels.plot: George and Mildred go house hunting and find their dream home in an up market part of town, but their potential neighbours, the Fourmiles, do not want them to move in.

items.title: S01E02 - The Bad Penny
items.summary: The Ropers finally move into their new house and to help things along Ann Fourmile invites them in for afternoon tea. When they get back home they find themselves locked out and the bath water running away.

infolabels.title: The Bad Penny
infolabels.plot: The Ropers finally move into their new house and to help things along Ann Fourmile invites them in for afternoon tea. When they get back home they find themselves locked out and the bath water running away.

items.title: S01E03 - ... And Women Must Weep
items.summary: George is talked into applying for a job - however, Mildred is given the position!

infolabels.title: ... And Women Must Weep
infolabels.plot: George is talked into applying for a job - however, Mildred is given the position!

items.title: S01E04 - Baby Talk
items.summary: After babysitting for the Fourmiles, Mildred begins to feel maternal, and she tries to convince George that they should adopt a child.

infolabels.title: Baby Talk
infolabels.plot: After babysitting for the Fourmiles, Mildred begins to feel maternal, and she tries to convince George that they should adopt a child.

items.title: S01E05 - Your Money or Your Life
items.summary: Mildred discovers that George has no insurance when a relative dies and the funeral costs are overwhelming. Jeffrey decides to cover the costs but then George changes his mind...

infolabels.title: Your Money or Your Life
infolabels.plot: Mildred discovers that George has no insurance when a relative dies and the funeral costs are overwhelming. Jeffrey decides to cover the costs but then George changes his mind...

items.title: S01E06 - Where My Caravan Has Rested
items.summary: George finally sells his old car and buys a trashy old caravan. He dumps it on the front lawn and when Mildred's pesky sister and brother-in-law visit, they stay in the Ropers' room, so a stubborn George stays in the caravan. That is, until it is towed away...

infolabels.title: Where My Caravan Has Rested
infolabels.plot: George finally sells his old car and buys a trashy old caravan. He dumps it on the front lawn and when Mildred's pesky sister and brother-in-law visit, they stay in the Ropers' room, so a stubborn George stays in the caravan. That is, until it is towed away...

items.title: S01E07 - The Little Dog Laughed
items.summary: George tries to cover up the fact that he lost Mildred's puppy by replacing it with a lookalike, but all goes awry when the police bring home the original dog.

infolabels.title: The Little Dog Laughed
infolabels.plot: George tries to cover up the fact that he lost Mildred's puppy by replacing it with a lookalike, but all goes awry when the police bring home the original dog.

items.title: S01E08 - Best Foot Forward
items.summary: George threatens to sue when Jeffrey accidentally causes him to fall by moving the ladder as George attempts to fix the TV aerial.

infolabels.title: Best Foot Forward
infolabels.plot: George threatens to sue when Jeffrey accidentally causes him to fall by moving the ladder as George attempts to fix the TV aerial.

items.title: S01E09 - My Husband Next Door
items.summary: While the Fourmiles are away, George and Mildred decide to get their house decorated by professionals... but the interior designers accidentally redecorate the Fourmiles' house...

infolabels.title: My Husband Next Door
infolabels.plot: While the Fourmiles are away, George and Mildred decide to get their house decorated by professionals... but the interior designers accidentally redecorate the Fourmiles' house...

items.title: S01E10 - Family Planning
items.summary: Mildred's mother visits, but the family believe that she is too old to look after herself and decide to place her in a home. However, George unexpectedly takes Mildred's mother's side and asks her to stay with them.

infolabels.title: Family Planning
infolabels.plot: Mildred's mother visits, but the family believe that she is too old to look after herself and decide to place her in a home. However, George unexpectedly takes Mildred's mother's side and asks her to stay with them.

items.title: S02E01 - Jumble Pie
items.summary: Mildred inadvertently contributes George's stash of gardening books to a church, but learns that they were actually old pornographic magazines, and must retrieve them before the vicar finds out!

infolabels.title: Jumble Pie
infolabels.plot: Mildred inadvertently contributes George's stash of gardening books to a church, but learns that they were actually old pornographic magazines, and must retrieve them before the vicar finds out!

items.title: S02E02 - All Around the Clock
items.summary: George buys Mildred a carriage clock for her birthday, but later learns the Fourmiles had been robbed and the clock might have once belonged to them.

infolabels.title: All Around the Clock
infolabels.plot: George buys Mildred a carriage clock for her birthday, but later learns the Fourmiles had been robbed and the clock might have once belonged to them.

items.title: S02E03 - The Travelling Man
items.summary: When Mildred rents out the backroom to a travelling salesman, George begins to believe the two are having an affair!

infolabels.title: The Travelling Man
infolabels.plot: When Mildred rents out the backroom to a travelling salesman, George begins to believe the two are having an affair!

items.title: S02E04 - The Unkindest Cut of All
items.summary: Mildred's sister Ethel and her husband Humphrey are coming round for a meal but George has forgotten to pay the electricity bill.

infolabels.title: The Unkindest Cut of All
infolabels.plot: Mildred's sister Ethel and her husband Humphrey are coming round for a meal but George has forgotten to pay the electricity bill.

items.title: S02E05 - The Right Way to Travel
items.summary: Mildred wants socialist George to join the local Tory party so they can qualify for a cheap holiday, courtesy of the Conservative Association.

infolabels.title: The Right Way to Travel
infolabels.plot: Mildred wants socialist George to join the local Tory party so they can qualify for a cheap holiday, courtesy of the Conservative Association.

items.title: S02E06 - The Dorothy Letters
items.summary: While cleaning, Mildred finds an old case containing George's old love letters written to someone named 'Dorothy'...

infolabels.title: The Dorothy Letters
infolabels.plot: While cleaning, Mildred finds an old case containing George's old love letters written to someone named 'Dorothy'...

items.title: S02E07 - No Business Like Show Business
items.summary: The Fourmiles host a Christmas pantomime but are short an 'ugly sister', so Mildred is asked to stand in.

infolabels.title: No Business Like Show Business
infolabels.plot: The Fourmiles host a Christmas pantomime but are short an 'ugly sister', so Mildred is asked to stand in.

items.title: S03E01 - Opportunity Knocks
items.summary: Jerry manages to trick George into trying to sell the house behind Mildred's back.

infolabels.title: Opportunity Knocks
infolabels.plot: Jerry manages to trick George into trying to sell the house behind Mildred's back.

items.title: S03E02 - And So to Bed
items.summary: The Ropers' bed finally collapses after 25 years, so Mildred decides to buy a new one... but George thinks that the nearest bookmaker is the best chance of getting the money.

infolabels.title: And So to Bed
infolabels.plot: The Ropers' bed finally collapses after 25 years, so Mildred decides to buy a new one... but George thinks that the nearest bookmaker is the best chance of getting the money.

items.title: S03E03 - I Believe in Yesterday
items.summary: Mildred receives a letter requesting a meeting, from an American former airman, with whom she had a wartime fling...

infolabels.title: I Believe in Yesterday
infolabels.plot: Mildred receives a letter requesting a meeting, from an American former airman, with whom she had a wartime fling...

items.title: S03E04 - The Four Letter Word
items.summary: George is forced to look for a job.

infolabels.title: The Four Letter Word
infolabels.plot: George is forced to look for a job.

items.title: S03E05 - The Delivery Man
items.summary: Ann finally gives birth, so George and Mildred help her out.

infolabels.title: The Delivery Man
infolabels.plot: Ann finally gives birth, so George and Mildred help her out.

items.title: S03E06 - Life with Father
items.summary: George's father is kicked out of his retirement home and asks to live with the Ropers.

infolabels.title: Life with Father
infolabels.plot: George's father is kicked out of his retirement home and asks to live with the Ropers.

items.title: S04E01 - Just the Job
items.summary: George manages to get a job as a traffic warden.

infolabels.title: Just the Job
infolabels.plot: George manages to get a job as a traffic warden.

items.title: S04E02 - Days of Beer and Rosie
items.summary: Whilst drinking in the pub, George runs into a man who claims to be his long lost son.

infolabels.title: Days of Beer and Rosie
infolabels.plot: Whilst drinking in the pub, George runs into a man who claims to be his long lost son.

items.title: S04E03 - You Must Have Showers
items.summary: Mildred decides to have a new shower installed in the bathroom. After several quotes, Jerry gets the job.

infolabels.title: You Must Have Showers
infolabels.plot: Mildred decides to have a new shower installed in the bathroom. After several quotes, Jerry gets the job.

items.title: S04E04 - All Work and No Pay
items.summary: George quits his job but cannot bring himself to inform Mildred.

infolabels.title: All Work and No Pay
infolabels.plot: George quits his job but cannot bring himself to inform Mildred.

items.title: S04E05 - Nappy Days
items.summary: Mildred is out at a pottery class, leaving George stuck with the Fourmiles' baby. But while looking after him, George gets a call to join the pub's darts team.

infolabels.title: Nappy Days
infolabels.plot: Mildred is out at a pottery class, leaving George stuck with the Fourmiles' baby. But while looking after him, George gets a call to join the pub's darts team.

items.title: S04E06 - The Mating Game
items.summary: Mildred wants the dog to have puppies but George sees it as an opportunity to get some extra cash.

infolabels.title: The Mating Game
infolabels.plot: Mildred wants the dog to have puppies but George sees it as an opportunity to get some extra cash.

items.title: S04E07 - On the Second Day of Christmas
items.summary: The Ropers are having another boring Christmas, so the Fourmiles invite them over for a drink. George then challenges Tristram to a game of computer tennis and wins. Afterwards, George plays Jeffrey, but ends up losing sixteen times... and owing a hefty debt!

infolabels.title: On the Second Day of Christmas
infolabels.plot: The Ropers are having another boring Christmas, so the Fourmiles invite them over for a drink. George then challenges Tristram to a game of computer tennis and wins. Afterwards, George plays Jeffrey, but ends up losing sixteen times... and owing a hefty debt!

items.title: S05E01 - Finders Keepers ?
items.summary: It's the Ropers' wedding anniversary and George has bought Mildred an expensive looking coat When she asks him where the money came from she discovers that he has found somebody's credit card.

infolabels.title: Finders Keepers ?
infolabels.plot: It's the Ropers' wedding anniversary and George has bought Mildred an expensive looking coat When she asks him where the money came from she discovers that he has found somebody's credit card.

items.title: S05E02 - In Sickness and in Health
items.summary: With Mildred in hospital, a lonely George has Jerry move in with him.

infolabels.title: In Sickness and in Health
infolabels.plot: With Mildred in hospital, a lonely George has Jerry move in with him.

items.title: S05E03 - The Last Straw
items.summary: Mildred is unhappy at her lack of social success, so she thinks about moving to Australia.

infolabels.title: The Last Straw
infolabels.plot: Mildred is unhappy at her lack of social success, so she thinks about moving to Australia.

items.title: S05E04 - A Driving Ambition
items.summary: Mildred is flattered when George displays a rare stirring of jealousy, following a sighting of her in a car with another man.

infolabels.title: A Driving Ambition
infolabels.plot: Mildred is flattered when George displays a rare stirring of jealousy, following a sighting of her in a car with another man.

items.title: S05E05 - A Military Pickle
items.summary: George's brother Charlie turns up with an interesting document.

infolabels.title: A Military Pickle
infolabels.plot: George's brother Charlie turns up with an interesting document.

items.title: S05E06 - Fishy Business
items.summary: When Mildred flushes George's goldfish down the drain, he decides that he needs a new pet.

infolabels.title: Fishy Business
infolabels.plot: When Mildred flushes George's goldfish down the drain, he decides that he needs a new pet.

items.title: S05E07 - I Gotta Horse
items.summary: Mildred notices a photo of an expensive antique in a magazine. Coincidentally, it looks just like one she has hidden away upstairs.

infolabels.title: I Gotta Horse
infolabels.plot: Mildred notices a photo of an expensive antique in a magazine. Coincidentally, it looks just like one she has hidden away upstairs.

items.title: S05E08 - The Twenty Six Year Itch
items.summary: Mildred decides she wants to go to the Tory Christmas ball, but George has other plans.

infolabels.title: The Twenty Six Year Itch
infolabels.plot: Mildred decides she wants to go to the Tory Christmas ball, but George has other plans.
